en: So, I've been watching a shit ton of what I like to call the Entenmann's Donut Goatee

en: Yeah, we watched one last night. Anything post-2000.
ko: 어제 밤에 하나 봤어. 2000년 이후의 것들.

en: Dude, let me suck off some coffee.
So, the last four years of Seagal movies.
And he's never been particularly an active guy, but you know, like-
ko: 그는 원래 활동적인 사람이 아니었지만, 알다시피-

en: Under siege era, he's in good shape. No.
And above the law, first of all, what people don't realize about Seagal is that when above
ko: 그리고 '법 위에'에서, 사람들이 시갈에 대해 잘 모르는 것은 그 영화가 나왔을 때 그는 이미 34살이었다는 거야. 맞아. 그는 젊은 사람이 아니었어.

en: the law came out, he was already like 34 years old. Right. He wasn't a young guy.
ko: 그의 첫 영화에서 그는 이미 나이가 좀 있었어.

en: So, his first movie, he was already, you know, like getting on.
ko: 그 영화에서 그의 헤어라인이 엉망인 걸 볼 수 있어. 응.

en: And you can see his hairline's fucked up in that movie. Yeah.
It's all like thin, you know, in the front.
And then in Hard to Kill, his hairline's fixed.
And you know, he's a little bit fatter.
ko: 그의 경력 내내 점점 더 뚱뚱해졌어.

en: And he just got progressively fatter throughout his entire career.
ko: 응, 그때는 그렇게 날씬할 필요가 없었지. 응.

en: Yeah, that was back in the day when you didn't have to be cut. Yeah.
